title: Model Cost Optimization
recommendation: Stay with Claude Haiku 4.5 — tone and tool calling quality outweigh 30-85% model cost savings from cheaper alternatives
key_findings: GPT-4o-mini is 85% cheaper on tokens but flattens Zoseph's character voice
Gemini 2.0 Flash is cheapest + fastest but worst at tone/character
Groq Llama 3.3 has best latency (200-400ms) but unreliable tool calling
DeepSeek V3 via adapter has double-hop latency risk, unproven tool calling
Real savings are only ~$0.05/min on $0.18/min total — voice provider is bigger lever
VAPI supports 7 LLM providers natively including OpenRouter for 200+ models
impact_on_D4: D4 (Conversation Design v3) should design around Anthropic model strengths — nuanced instruction following, concession-pivot patterns, tool calling reliability. No model-specific prompt gymnastics needed.
